notes:
v1.3.4 Dependency Patch
🔧 The module manifest now requires GlitchSmith Library v0.6.0, which is needed for the decimal currency metadata used by the v1.3.3 update. No gameplay behavior changed from v1.3.3.

v1.3.3 Update
✨ Decimal currency support: Shops can now price items in fractional amounts when the underlying currency is configured as decimal in GlitchSmith Library (for example SWADE's single-currency setup). Item price inputs, GM wallet inputs, sell modifier, payment planning, and price displays all respect the configured precision. Integer currencies (D&D 5e, PF2e, etc.) keep their existing whole-number behavior.
🐛 Decimal sell prices: Opening the Sell tab for an item priced with a fractional amount (such as 0.5) no longer throws INVALID_BASE_UNIT and breaks the menu.
🐛 Limited-stock purchases no longer close another player's open purchase confirmation dialog when stock changes after a completed transaction.
🐛 Item rarity normalization now handles non-string rarity values from unsupported or custom systems, so shops no longer fail to open after items with numeric or object-based rarity data are added.

v1.3.2 Update
✨ Smartphone Banking Payments: Shop Settings can route shop purchases and sell payouts through each character's primary Smartphone Widget bank account. Completed transactions show up in the bank history. Requires Smartphone Widget v2.2.0 only when using this payment route.
✨ Integration Buyer Selection: Added openShopWithBuyerSelection(shopId) for modules that open a specific shop directly. Players with multiple owned characters pick who enters the shop; players with one owned character enter directly.

v1.3.1 Hotfix
✨ Unsupported systems can now read item prices from the new world-level Item Price Paths setting (complete price fields, separate gp/sp/cp-style fields, or amount + unit fields).
🐛 Multi-currency purchases now prefer the currency specified by the item price before falling back to exchange-style payment planning.

v1.3.0 Update
✨ Shop Directory now supports token-only shops while their unlinked token is on the current scene.
✨ GMs can open Shop Settings directly from Directory cards and remove Stylish Shop setup from an actor or token without deleting anything.
✨ Module settings now include a GlitchSmith Discord shortcut for support, feedback, and updates.
🐛 Fantasy shop right-side banner text is now editable from the Identity tab.
🐛 The left Scene Control Shop button no longer stays visually active after opening the Shop Directory.

announcement.title: 🛍️ Stylish Shop v1.3.4
announcement.content:
Stylish Shop v1.3.4 is a dependency metadata patch.

  • The module now requires GlitchSmith Library v0.6.0, which is needed for the decimal currency metadata added in the v1.3.3 update.
  • No gameplay behavior changed from v1.3.3.
